infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow PrintBot to access your photos to upload and print documents. This permission is required to select files from your photo library to upload to our servers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow PrintBot to save printed documents to your photo library. This permission is required to select printed documents after processing in our servers.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow PrintBot to use Face ID for secure authentication. This permission is required to use Face ID to log in to the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow PrintBot to access your location to find nearby printing locations. This permission is required to show you the nearest printing locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow PrintBot to access your location to find nearby printing locations. This permission is required to show you the nearest printing locations.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Allow PrintBot to send you notifications to keep you updated on your print orders.
